nodes.name: Poll Every 5 Minutes
nodes.notes: Default: every 5 minutes. Configurable in node settings. Timezone set at workflow level (Europe/Madrid).

nodes.name: Detect & Prepare
nodes.notes: Paginated fetch of new leads with watermark-based dedup. SETUP: edit API_BASE and API_KEY constants at the top of the code. First run seeds the watermark without sending.

nodes.name: Send to Telegram
nodes.notes: SETUP: 1) Create Telegram API credential with your bot token (same as daily-ops-snapshot). 2) Replace CONFIGURE_ME with your Telegram chat ID.

nodes.name: Update Watermark
nodes.notes: Advances lastSeenId only after all Telegram messages sent successfully. If Telegram fails, watermark stays — next poll retries.
